Unnamed: 0 Unnamed: 1 Unnamed: 2 Unnamed: 3 Unnamed: 4 Unnamed: 5
 
 HR REF: 26_2024 
 Job Title IT Business Analyst 
 Job Title's Detail Business Analyst Finance_Business 
 
 Company Name 
 Identifier of profile 
 Answer date 
 Nb years of experience\nexcl intershipts / etc 
 
 Answer established with the candidate 
 Reason for the termination of the last experience 
 Feedback/reference of previous client 
 
 Freelance / Employee 
 If freelance, how many years have you (the company) worked with the freelance ? 
 Daily rate( €/d excl. taxes) 
 Context The consultant will intervene inside IT Departments to support ongoing projects and run activities. Current roadmap aims at maintaining current financial accounting, consolidation, controlling and tax topics for Finance Department with tight links to Regulatory Reporting\n\nThe consultant will be a Business Analyst in Paris working with 3 other Business Analysts/developers based in Paris, managing the delivery and quality of service and coordinating IT ressources to meet business requirements. 
 Matching assessment
 Background Profile experience must meet the minimal requirements: Input a value from 0 (min) to 3 (max)
 · 4-5 years experience working in IT department with financial expertise 0..3
 · Business context : Banking or Financial institution\n · Recent experience 0..3
 · Functional context : Finance department (Recent Experience) 
 - Acounting and consolidation processes 0..3
 - Financial reporting 0..3
 - Financial reconciliation 0..3
 - Tax experience 0..3
 · System context : Recent experience as a BA in designing, specifying & testing specific development developped in-house and interfaces with external tools 0..3
 
 Detailed roles Expectations Matching assessment
 Collaborating with the business contacts / end-users in Frankfurt, Paris and Tunis 
 · Qualify, challenge and frame the needs directly with the operational business lines or their representative 0..3
 · Rationalization of business case, formalization of rational and preparation of synthesis for decision-making by top management 0..3
 · Identification of architecture impacts, definition of target functionnal architecture 0..3
 · Manage the governance committees (English), workshop… 0..3
 · Design the features (UI / logic / data), and model functionnally the system (sequence, dependancies…) 0..3
 · Manage Incident process: qualification, functionnal analysis, coordination, resolution plan 0..3
 · Manage change requests in accordance with the service budget and framework 0..3
 · Design Workbreakdown structure, planning and budget management 0..3
 Collaborating with the developer teams in Tunisia and Paris 
 · Write detailed functional specifications 0..3
 · Provide functional support to developers 0..3
 · Acceptance and validation of functionalities 0..3
 Collaborating with Finance Lead and Head of IT Finance & Risk in Paris/Frankfurt 
 · Project and progress reporting 0..3
 · Reporting of alerts, risks and proposed solutions 0..3
 
 Education · Graduate of an engineering school or Master's degree in IT or Business Administration input the name and year of graduation
 
 Expected skills Knowledge foundation 
 · Functional knowledge on accounting and financial controlling 0..3
 · Knowledge of SQL (Oracle, MS SQL Server) (must have) 0..3
 · Knowledge of accounting consolidation principles 0..3
 · Knowledge on accounting software such as AIS and CODA (nice to have) 0..3
 · IT Organization roles and responsibilities 0..3
 
 Skills foundation 
 · Fluent English, essential 0..3
 · Ability to demonstrate / argue, ability to defend one's reasoning 0..3
 · Ability to challenge a business process 0..3
 · Ability to drive projects 0..3
 · Design / functional modeling of an information system and datamodel 0..3
 · Clear and concise verbal communication 0..3
 · Excellent Written communication and synthesis skills 0..3
 · Excellent interpersonal skills 0..3
 
 Mindset foundation 
 · Critical: Personal organization skills to manage multiple topics in parallel with relevant priority management 0..3
 · Self-learner, self-directed 0..3
 · Critical thinking, analytical approach, methodical 0..3
 · Autonomy and strong personal energy/dynamics 0..3
 · Assertiveness, sense of responsibility/ownership 0..3
 
 Optional bonus criterias 
 · French speaker 0..3
 · Data / Reporting / BI / Analytics 0..3
 
 
 Workplace\n On-site work based in the following location in Paris 
 · 5 Bd du Général Leclerc, 92110 Clichy 
 
 International business travel supported by Oddo, average stays of 2-3 days: 
 · Germany : Frankfurt (~ 1x / quarter) 
 · Tunisia : Tunis (~ 2x / year)
